acceptance_criteria: Bookmark a post from Ivory; it appears in GET /api/v1/bookmarks; unbookmark removes it; bookmarks are per-persona not global; Status.bookmarked field is true for bookmarked posts when authed
description: Implement local-only bookmarks. Bookmarks are stored locally and never federated. POST /api/v1/statuses/:id/bookmark adds a bookmark. POST /api/v1/statuses/:id/unbookmark removes it. GET /api/v1/bookmarks returns paginated list of bookmarked statuses. Requires a bookmarks table (account_id, post_id or remote_post_id, created_at).
design: bookmarks table: account_id, post_id (nullable), remote_post_id (nullable), created_at, CHECK that exactly one of post_id/remote_post_id is set. Status.bookmarked: check if bookmarks row exists for authed account + post. GET /api/v1/bookmarks: JOIN to posts/remote_posts, serialize as Status array.
title: Bookmarks (POST /bookmark, /unbookmark, GET /api/v1/bookmarks)
